costs.note: Budget = Ryanair/easyJet + hostel/budget riads. Mid-range = BA/Royal Air Maroc + boutique coastal riads. Book flights 6–8 weeks ahead for best fares.

stops.name: Marrakesh Menara Airport
stops.desc: Arrive, collect bags, petit taxi to medina (~15 min)

stops.name: Djemaa el-Fna Square
stops.desc: Evening stroll — street performers, snake charmers, food stalls

stops.name: Medina Riad
stops.desc: Check into your riad in the heart of the medina

stops.name: Bahia Palace
stops.desc: Stunning 19th-century palace with intricate tilework

stops.name: Saadian Tombs
stops.desc: Royal tombs from the Saadian dynasty, rediscovered 1917

stops.name: Marrakesh Souks
stops.desc: Labyrinthine spice, textile & artisan markets

stops.name: Jardin Majorelle
stops.desc: YSL's iconic cobalt-blue gardens + YSL Museum next door

stops.name: El Badi Palace
stops.desc: Ruined 16th-century palace; climb ramparts for views

stops.name: Essaouira Medina
stops.desc: 2.5 hr drive; check into coastal riad

stops.name: Skala de la Ville
stops.desc: Atlantic sea bastions with cannon ramparts

stops.name: Essaouira Fishing Port
stops.desc: Fresh grilled fish dinner by the harbour

stops.name: Plage d'Essaouira
stops.desc: World-famous kitesurfing & windsurfing beach

stops.name: Blue Fishing Harbour
stops.desc: Watch trawlers come in; fresh seafood stalls

stops.name: Essaouira Art Galleries
stops.desc: Morocco's art capital — studios in the medina

stops.name: Argan Oil Cooperative
stops.desc: See argan oil made; buy direct from the cooperative

stops.name: Beach Horse Riding
stops.desc: Gallop on the wide Atlantic beach

stops.name: Sidi M. Ben Abdallah Museum
stops.desc: Free museum of local history & crafts

stops.name: Gnaoua Music Venue
stops.desc: Live Gnaoua music unique to Essaouira

stops.name: Agadir Beach
stops.desc: 8 km of golden sand — Morocco's premier beach resort

stops.name: Souk El Had
stops.desc: One of Morocco's largest markets — 6,000+ stalls

stops.name: Agadir Marina
stops.desc: Boat trips; seafood restaurants on the waterfront

stops.name: Sunrise Beach Walk
stops.desc: Early morning walk on the empty beach

stops.name: Thuya Wood Workshops
stops.desc: Watch artisans carve Essaouira's famous thuya wood

stops.name: Place Moulay el Hassan
stops.desc: Final mint tea; spices & silver jewellery souvenirs

stops.name: Gueliz (Nouvelle Ville)
stops.desc: French-influenced new city — cafés & boutiques

stops.name: Marrakesh Airport (Departure)
stops.desc: Fly home — or continue for 3 optional days

stops.name: Hassan Tower
stops.desc: Iconic 12th-century unfinished minaret

stops.name: Kasbah of the Udayas
stops.desc: Blue-and-white kasbah with ocean views

stops.name: Royal Palace, Rabat
stops.desc: Magnificent palace complex with giant brass gates

stops.name: Chefchaouen Medina
stops.desc: The famous blue-painted mountain town

stops.name: Spanish Mosque
stops.desc: 30-min hike; panoramic views over the Rif Mountains

stops.name: Ras El Maa Waterfall
stops.desc: Mountain stream — serene, authentic local scene

stops.name: Tangier Ibn Battouta Airport
stops.desc: 1.5 hrs from Chefchaouen — budget departure

stops.name: Casablanca Mohammed V Airport
stops.desc: 4 hrs from Chefchaouen — more long-haul options
